_doc: Tests in this list are KNOWN to fail on the CF Pages staging environment due to chronic cold-start saturation (Worker isolate boots cold for every preview deploy, /api/* routes 5xx for the first ~30s of E2E, axe-core a11y scans then run on the error fallback UI which has its own contrast issues). Production traffic doesn't hit cold-start cascade because user load keeps isolates warm. These tests pass against prod and pass intermittently against staging. Until we either (a) pre-warm staging Workers before running E2E, or (b) re-engineer the cold-start cascade, the staging gate exempts these tests from blocking the gate. New failures NOT in this list still block.
_pattern: Match by test title (full file path + describe + test name). Substring match.
